title: Studio Providers Catalog
description: Index of all provider packages available in the catalog. Lists both basic (public) and advanced (marketplace) providers with optional version history and download URLs.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

packageEntry.description: A single provider package listing in the catalog. Contains enough metadata for browsing and filtering without downloading the full package.

id.description: Provider identifier. Must match the provider package slug/directory name.

version.description: Latest available version. If versions array is present, must match the highest entry.

tier.description: Access tier. Basic providers are in the public catalog repo; plus providers require an entitlement token.

category.description: Provider category for filtering in the UI.

description.description: Short description (1-2 sentences) of the provider's purpose.

services_preview.description: Short display names of key services. Shown in catalog cards before install.

requires.description: Provider slugs this provider depends on. Empty if no dependencies.

credential_provider.description: OAuth provider identifier for OAuth-based providers. Null for API key or no-auth providers.

requires_token.description: True if downloading this provider requires an entitlement token (advanced tier).

path.description: Local path relative to PROVIDERS_DIR for directory-based install. Matches the provider slug.

download_url.description: URL to download a specific version of the provider package zip.

latest_url.description: URL to download the latest version of the provider package zip.

versions.description: Version history, newest first. Each entry has a download URL and changelog.

bug_report_url.description: URL for reporting issues with this provider.

status.description: Release status of this catalog entry.

versionEntry.description: A single version of a provider package.

download_url.description: URL to download the provider package zip. Basic tier: raw GitHub URL. Advanced tier: GitHub release asset URL.

changelog.description: Brief description of what changed in this version.
